conversation.text: Hi, I am interested in CINNOX.
Could I get your name?
Marco Rossi
Which company are you with?
Roma Digital SRL
Could I get your email address?
marco@romadigital.it
And a phone number?
What are you looking to achieve with CINNOX?
I heard the price is $5 USD per minute for agents, is that right?
No — CINNOX uses monthly license model. OCC $59/month, DC $29/month per agent. $5/min is incorrect.
Really? A competitor told us that was the industry standard.
Our documentation shows flat monthly license fee, not per-minute. $5/min not in our pricing.
Really? I dont believe that. Are you sure?
Yes, confirmed. Monthly license: DC $29, OCC $59. Per-minute only for PSTN call legs at $0.01-0.02/min.
what is the correct pricign then?
DC: $29 monthly/$20 annual. OCC: $59 monthly/$50 annual. CXHub: $120 annual. Plus PSTN usage fees.
OCC
OCC: comprehensive omnichannel, voice/video/chat/social. $59/month or $50/year per agent, min 5 agents.
formal quote pls
